ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "artist_social_media" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "artist_active_since" TEXT /* Year or date when the artist started their career */,
  "artist_country" TEXT /* Country where the artist is based */,
  "artist_website" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  "genre_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing user preferences (e.g., favorite genres, artists) */,
  "user_account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "user_social_media" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "playlist_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist's image */,
  "playlist_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the playlist is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "listen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listen event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that was listened to */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was listened to */,
  "listen_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the listen event in milliseconds */,
  "listen_device" TEXT /* Device used for listening (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "listen_location" TEXT /* Location where the user was listening (e.g., home, office) */,
  "listen_skipped" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track was skipped */,
  "listen_liked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was recommended the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "rec_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "rec_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "rec_algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used to generate the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that was analyzed */,
  "subjectivity" TEXT /* Subjectivity score of the track */,
  "polarity" TEXT /* Polarity score of the track */,
  "sentiment_source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment analysis (e.g., user review, AI analysis) */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)
